---
name: Feature Request 🚀
about: Suggest an idea or proposal for a new backend feature, service, or API.
title: 'feat: [Short title of the feature]'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Proposal
A clear and concise description of what the feature is and why it's needed in the backend.

## 👤 User Story / Use Case
*As a* [User type / Frontend service], *I want to* [perform action / request endpoint] *so that* [achieve benefit / get specific data].

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution / API Design
Describe the solution or API response structure you would like to see implemented. Provide a draft JSON payload or endpoint path if applicable.
- **Method**: [GET / POST / PUT / DELETE]
- **Endpoint**: `/api/v1/...`
- **Request Body (JSON)**:
```json
{}
```

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered, if any.

## 📋 Additional Context
Add any other context, database schema diagrams, or documentation links here.
